texto: It was inevitable, as soon as legends of miracles became attached to the names of the great mystics, that the credulous masses should applaud imposture more than true devotion; the cult of the saints, against which orthodox Islam ineffectually protested, promoted ignorance and superstition, and confounded charlatanry with lofty speculation. To live scandalously, to act impudently, to speak unintelligibly—this was the easy highroad to fame, wealth, and power.
explicacao: Orientação direta de A.J. Arberry sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “It was inevitable, as soon as legends of miracles became attached to the names of the great mysti…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, 1950, charlatanism, útil em momentos de termino e viagem.
